title: DWP register of board members’ interests Apr 2024 to Mar 2025
body: "DWP maintains a register of the private interests held by members of its board.  The purpose of the register is to give board members the mechanism to publicly declare any private interests which may conflict, or may be perceived to conflict, with their public duties.  This document is a record of the private interests declared by the DWP board members for the period April 2024 to March 2025.  "
